history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up selfie of a young person with dark, fluffy hair, looking directly at the camera with one eye winking. Their face is adorned with multiple dark red lipstick kiss marks, strategically placed on the cheeks, nose, and forehead. They are wearing a black hoodie with a prominent, stylized purple logo on the chest that appears to read "YOM" or similar. The person is lying down on a soft, fluffy pink surface, possibly a blanket or pillow, which fills the background. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a gentle glow on the subject's face and highlighting the texture of the pink background. The overall mood is playful and flirtatious, with a touch of youthful charm. The color palette is dominated by the contrast between the black hoodie, the vibrant pink background, and the deep red of the kiss marks. The style is reminiscent of a social media selfie with a playful digital filter.
